verify.subject: Verify your email
verify.title: Confirm your email address
verify.description: You’re almost ready to start using
verify.trouble: If the button doesn’t work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verify.ignore: If you didn’t create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

resetPassword.subject: Reset your password
resetPassword.title: Password Reset Request
resetPassword.description: We received a request to reset the password for your account
resetPassword.expiry: This link will expire in 1 hour. If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this URL into your browser:
resetPassword.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will stay the same.

invite.subject: You're invited to join {{appName}} team
invite.title: Join the Team
invite.description: You have been invited to join the administration panel
invite.action: To accept this invitation and set up your account, please click the button below.
invite.expiry: * This invitation link is unique to you and will expire in 7 days.
invite.trouble: If the button doesn’t work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
invite.ignore: If you weren't expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.

passwordChanged.subject: Password Changed Successfully
passwordChanged.title: Password Updated
passwordChanged.description: The password for your {{appName}} account has been successfully changed. You can now log in using your new password.
passwordChanged.securityWarning: If you did not change your password, your account may have been compromised. Please contact our support team immediately or reset your password again using your registered email address.
passwordChanged.footer: This is an automated notification, please do not reply to this email.
